# fuzzymatch — github.com/axonops/fuzzymatch

A pure-Go library for fuzzy string matching: 23 string-similarity
algorithms, a weighted Scorer (Phase 8), a collection-scan sub-package
(Phase 9), and a one-to-many Extract API (Phase 10). Stdlib-only with
one curated runtime dep (golang.org/x/text for Unicode normalisation).
Apache-2.0. Go 1.26+. No cgo.

## Status

Pre-release. The API is not stable until v1.0.0. Phase 1 ships the
foundation primitives: AlgoID dispatch enum, sentinel errors, Normalise,
Tokenise. Phase 2+ adds the 23 algorithms, then Scorer (Phase 8) and
scan / Extract (Phases 9–10).

## Public API (root package: fuzzymatch)

### AlgoID dispatch enum

- type AlgoID int
- func (AlgoID) String() string
- func AlgoIDs() []AlgoID
- const AlgoLevenshtein AlgoID
- const AlgoDamerauLevenshteinOSA AlgoID
- const AlgoDamerauLevenshteinFull AlgoID
- const AlgoHamming AlgoID
- const AlgoJaro AlgoID
- const AlgoJaroWinkler AlgoID
- const AlgoStrcmp95 AlgoID
- const AlgoSmithWatermanGotoh AlgoID
- const AlgoLCSStr AlgoID
- const AlgoQGramJaccard AlgoID
- const AlgoSorensenDice AlgoID
- const AlgoCosine AlgoID
- const AlgoTversky AlgoID
- const AlgoMongeElkan AlgoID
- const AlgoTokenSortRatio AlgoID
- const AlgoTokenSetRatio AlgoID
- const AlgoPartialRatio AlgoID
- const AlgoTokenJaccard AlgoID
- const AlgoSoundex AlgoID
- const AlgoDoubleMetaphone AlgoID
- const AlgoNYSIIS AlgoID
- const AlgoMRA AlgoID
- const AlgoRatcliffObershelp AlgoID

### Levenshtein edit-distance similarity

- func LevenshteinDistance(a, b string) int
- func LevenshteinDistanceRunes(a, b string) int
- func LevenshteinScore(a, b string) float64
- func LevenshteinScoreRunes(a, b string) float64

### Hamming distance similarity

- func HammingDistance(a, b string) int
- func HammingDistanceRunes(a, b string) int
- func HammingScore(a, b string) float64
- func HammingScoreRunes(a, b string) float64

### Normalisation

- type NormalisationOptions struct
- func DefaultNormalisationOptions() NormalisationOptions
- func Normalise(s string, opts NormalisationOptions) string

### Tokenisation

- type TokeniseOptions struct
- func DefaultTokeniseOptions() TokeniseOptions
- func Tokenise(s string, opts TokeniseOptions) []string

### Sentinel errors

- var ErrInvalidInput error
- var ErrInvalidConfiguration error
- var ErrInvalidAlgorithm error
- var ErrEmptyInput error

## Out of v1.0 scope

- Needleman-Wunsch (superseded by Smith-Waterman-Gotoh's local
  alignment).
- Soft-TFIDF (out of scope; no domain corpus dependency wanted).
- Metaphone 3 (U.S. Patent 7,440,941 — declined for licence hygiene).
- ML / embeddings (out of scope for a pure-function library).
- Goroutine-parallel scan (Phase 9 may revisit; not in v1.0).
- Persistent caching (not a library concern).

## Documentation

- README.md — project front door
- docs/algorithms.md — per-algorithm detail (23 sections)
- docs/scorer.md — Scorer composition (Phase 8)
- docs/scan.md — collection scan (Phase 9)
- docs/extending.md — custom algorithms
- docs/tuning.md — threshold calibration
- docs/performance.md — benchmark numbers
- docs/faq.md — common questions and exclusions
- docs/requirements.md — authoritative spec
- llms-full.txt — full API reference with per-symbol signatures and
  per-algorithm primary-source citations

## For agents

- .claude/agents/ — domain review gates
- .claude/skills/ — reusable standards
- CLAUDE.md — project conventions
